Capstan Human Surface

OrbitOps — 订单到收入运营平台

面向 B2B SaaS 公司的全链路收入运营平台：统一管理客户、合同、订单、订阅、账单、回款、续费、对账、异常处理和外部系统对接，同时支持人工运营和 Agent 自动化操作。

Operator Console

Navigate between projected routes, preview runtime states, and trigger generated actions without leaving the human surface shell.

Action Reachability 339 surfaced actions

Attention Inbox

idle

Open the global durable-work inbox first when you need to discover approvals, input requests, blocks, failures, pauses, or cancellations before targeting a specific route.

Attention Inbox 0 open
Approval Required 0 open
Input Required 0 open
Blocked 0 open
Failed 0 open
Paused 0 open
Cancelled 0 open

Task Attention Presets

12 presets

Open durable work grouped by task before deciding which route or run to inspect next.

Task Attention Decide Approval Request Task
Auto Slot Primary Slot

Durable runs started by task:decideApprovalRequestTask. Opening this preset auto-saves it into the Primary slot unless you manually replace that slot.

0 open

Auto Slot Primary Slot

Durable runs started by task:reviewCustomerAccountTask. Opening this preset auto-saves it into the Primary slot unless you manually replace that slot.

{
  "event": "human_surface.ready",
  "activeRoute": "workspaceHome",
  "routes": 134
}

OrbitOps — 订单到收入运营平台 Workspace

面向 B2B SaaS 公司的全链路收入运营平台：统一管理客户、合同、订单、订阅、账单、回款、续费、对账、异常处理和外部系统对接，同时支持人工运营和 Agent 自动化操作。

workspacegenerated /

Field Projection

No fields projectedThis route is driven by higher-level graph semantics rather than a direct resource schema.

Capability Actions

激活订单
ready launch action

Execute the "activateSalesOrder" capability from the projected human surface.

添加审计备注
ready submit action

Execute the "addAuditNote" capability from the projected human surface.

催收发票
ready launch action

Execute the "collectBillingInvoice" capability from the projected human surface.

Work Request Detail

A generated detail route derived from the "workRequest" resource schema.

detailgraph-definedresource:workRequest /resources/work-request/detail

Detail Projection

Requested By Id string · required
Requested By Id sample
Status string · required
Status sample
Summary string
Summary sample
Title string · required
Title sample

Capability Actions

List Work Requests
ready run action

Read the work requests currently tracked by the workflow system.

Process Work Request
approval required launch action workflow:processWorkRequestTask

Advance one work request through a durable review workflow. This action is present, but the graph marks it as approval-gated.

Submit Work Request
ready submit action

Create and submit a new work request for review.

Attention Queues

Durable route actions automatically project grouped approval, input, block, failure, pause, and cancellation queues for operator supervision.
